summary: Amazing sounding recording of the first set, with fans eagerly hunting for the missing second set
review: The lone review praises the audio as “amazing,” indicating a very clear and enjoyable listening experience. No specific songs or performance details are mentioned, but the reviewer’s enthusiasm for finding the second set suggests the show itself is highly regarded.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one 5‑star review; it lauds the sound quality but provides no detail on performance, so rating leans heavily on recording praise while confidence remains low due to limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer describes the audio as “amazing,” implying crisp, clear sound with no noted flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set flow; reviewer simply notes desire to locate the second set.
